headline: Stock Market Today, April 27: Cleveland-Cliffs Jumps After Investors Reassess Positive Q1 Trends
summary: Heavy trading, stabilizing steel demand, and a narrowing loss put this turnaround story back in focus, today, April 27, 2026.
